queueTopLevel.activation_rule: Use these items immediately on shards whose current flagship closeout slice is empty; do not let them replace active shards already assigned to the current closeout frontier.

packageTitle: Keep native-host release proof independent for the primary desktop head
summary: Next-90 milestone 101.3 proves Avalonia as the independent primary desktop route on Windows, macOS, and Linux without counting Blazor fallback proof.
